methodology.name: LLM Border Threat Taxonomy
methodology.description: OpenRouter free routing chooses the final country attribution and canonical threat category for each headline.

regional_summary_6h.headline: Iran theater dominates regional threat picture as Trump signals war objectives near completion amid mixed messaging
bullets: Trump declared Iran war objectives are nearing completion, indicating a potential shift in regional military posture.
Contradictory messaging emerged as Trump simultaneously asserted the Iran conflict will continue while attempting to calm regional nerves.
Unanswered strategic questions surrounding the campaign sustain cross-border uncertainty and complicate immediate threat assessments for adjacent border zones.
regional_summary_6h.watch: Monitor Trump and Iranian communications for definitive ceasefire terms or renewed kinetic operations along shared borders.
